commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `waitForAgentJob` to return a pending timeout snapshot from the outer fallback timer and adds a fake-timer regression test for that race.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +37. Total +42 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main can create a pending timeout snapshot, then the outer `waitForAgentJob` timer resolves `null` because it checks only pending errors. I did not run tests in this read-only checkout.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve hard-timeout forwarding while keeping retry-grace behavior for correctable pending timeouts.

target.title: fix: forward pending timeout snapshot in waitForAgentJob fallback timer
target.author: huangting-xy

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
